description: In 1963, Zora Arkus-Duntov thought that putting a 377 CI (6.2L) all aluminum V8 into a speedster was smart, in the end, they created the CERV II, a spiritual successor of the CERV. Producing 500+Bhp provides this unique prototype a 3 second 0-60 and a 200 mph+ top speed, combine that with AWD technology and a featherweight construction, it certainly lives up to its name.
creator: Aqo
